overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through an autumn urban environment. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses busy streets with heavy traffic including taxis and delivery trucks, passes an emergency accident scene with a flipped vehicle, and reaches a waterfront promenade with a large red bridge visible in the background.

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a city sidewalk next to a tall stone retaining wall. The scene features autumn trees, multi-story apartment buildings in the background, and moderate pedestrian traffic. The character moves steadily forward through the urban environment in bright midday sunlight.

crosses the street and begins walking in the road between parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crosses the intersection and enters the street, walking between parked cars and moving traffic

tan delivery truck with red 'MINOTAUR' logo on the side

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the sidewalk onto the street, crossing an intersection with a gas station visible on the right. Spider-Man enters the roadway between parked cars and delivery trucks, moving from the pedestrian zone into the vehicle traffic area.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city street with parked cars and moving traffic

events.description: navigating through moderate traffic with yellow taxis and delivery trucks
approaching emergency accident scene with fire truck and police car visible ahead

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking down the center of the street between lanes of parked and moving vehicles

traffic signal lights hanging over the intersection ahead

white police car with blue markings parked at the scene

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man continues walking down the middle of the busy street, passing between parked cars on the left and moving traffic including yellow taxis on the right. In the distance, a red bridge structure becomes visible. The character approaches an accident scene with emergency vehicles including a fire truck and police car.

events.description: passing overturned black SUV and emergency responders at accident scene
reaching waterfront promenade with river and bridge views

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks past the accident scene with emergency personnel and continues toward the waterfront promenade

segments.scene_description: The character passes a dramatic accident scene featuring an overturned black SUV with emergency responders and police present. Continuing past the accident, Spider-Man reaches a waterfront promenade with views of the river and a large red bridge structure spanning the water in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Spider-Man navigates a bustling autumn city street that eventually opens up to a wide waterfront vista. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk beside a tall stone retaining wall and apartment buildings under bright midday sunlight. As he leaves the pedestrian zone, the camera follows him across an intersection and into the roadway, weaving between parked delivery trucks and a nearby gas station. The scene then shifts into the middle of a busy street filled with yellow taxis, moving toward a distant red bridge and an emergency scene marked by a fire truck and police car. Finally, the camera passes an overturned black SUV and its responders before emerging onto a waterfront promenade with a clear view of the river and the massive red bridge spanning the water.
